hooks.command: bash -lc 'for p in "plugins/rldyour-flow/hooks/session_start_context.sh" "${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}/plugins/cache/rldyour-codex/rldyour-flow/local/hooks/session_start_context.sh"; do [ -f "$p" ] && exec bash "$p"; done; exit 0'

bash -lc 'for p in "plugins/rldyour-flow/hooks/post_tool_use_commit_advice.sh" "${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}/plugins/cache/rldyour-codex/rldyour-flow/local/hooks/post_tool_use_commit_advice.sh"; do [ -f "$p" ] && exec bash "$p"; done; exit 0'

bash -lc 'for p in "plugins/rldyour-flow/hooks/stop_post_task_sync.sh" "${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}/plugins/cache/rldyour-codex/rldyour-flow/local/hooks/stop_post_task_sync.sh"; do [ -f "$p" ] && exec bash "$p"; done; exit 0'
